title: Update Cheng profile: Remove logo, add WhatsApp booking with number 9119960204

requirements.summary: Remove the logo image from the header
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image element in the site header is removed
The header layout adjusts gracefully without the logo

file_operations.description: Remove the logo image element from the header component. Update the header layout to adjust gracefully without the logo while preserving the navigation functionality.

requirements.summary: Add WhatsApp booking functionality with phone number +91 9119960204
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp booking button or link is added with phone number +91 9119960204
Clicking the WhatsApp element opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message to the specified number
The WhatsApp integration is clearly visible and accessible to users

file_operations.description: Update the contact phone constant to +91 9119960204 and add a WhatsApp number constant for consistent usage across the application.

Add a WhatsApp booking button or link that opens WhatsApp with phone number +91 9119960204 and a pre-filled booking inquiry message. Make it prominent and accessible in the hero section's call-to-action area.

Add WhatsApp booking functionality with phone number +91 9119960204 to the contact section. Include a clickable WhatsApp link or button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message for booking inquiries.

requirements.summary: Update contact phone number across all sections to display +91 9119960204 for WhatsApp booking
acceptanceCriteria: All selected contact/booking elements display the new WhatsApp number +91 9119960204
The number is formatted consistently across all locations
The number is linked to open WhatsApp when clicked
